Miguel Batista

Position: Pitcher

Bats: Right  •  Throws: Right

6-1, 210lb (185cm, 95kg)

Born: February 19, 1971 in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic do

High School: Nueva Horizondes (San Pedro de Macoris, Dominican Republic)

Debut: April 11, 1992 (Age 21-052d, 16,105th in major league history)
   vs. PHI 2.0 IP, 4 H, 1 SO, 3 BB, 2 ER

Last Game: September 11, 2012 (Age 41-205d)
   vs. MIL 1.0 IP, 2 H, 0 SO, 0 BB, 1 ER

Rookie Status: Exceeded rookie limits during 1998 season

Agents: Martin Arburua

Full Name: Miguel Jerez Batista

Pronunciation: \buh-TEE-sta\

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Miguel Batista?

Miguel Batista is 55 years old.

When was Miguel Batista born?

Miguel Batista was born on February 19, 1971.

Where was Miguel Batista born?

Miguel Batista was born in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic.

How tall is Miguel Batista?

Miguel Batista is 6-1 (185 cm) tall.

How much did Miguel Batista weigh when playing?

Miguel Batista weighed 210 lbs (95 kg) when playing.

How many seasons did Miguel Batista play?

Miguel Batista played 18 seasons.

Is Miguel Batista in the Hall of Fame?

Miguel Batista has not been elected into the Hall of Fame.

What position did Miguel Batista play?

Miguel Batista was a Pitcher.

How many strikeouts did Miguel Batista have?

Miguel Batista had 1,250 strikeouts over his career.

How many teams has Miguel Batista played for?

Miguel Batista played for 11 teams; the Arizona Diamondbacks, Atlanta Braves, Chicago Cubs, Florida Marlins, Kansas City Royals, New York Mets, Pittsburgh Pirates, Seattle Mariners, St. Louis Cardinals, Toronto Blue Jays and Washington Nationals.

How many World Series has Miguel Batista won?

Miguel Batista has won 1 World Series.

When did Miguel Batista retire?

Miguel Batista last played in 2012.
